commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: No repair lane action is appropriate because the remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer real behavior proof, not a narrow code defect.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression remains in the final diff; the earlier CodeQL regex concern was addressed by replacing those parsing regexes with index/split scanning. (sha=572e3449f5cb8532e682a663b635d7e99bc70f79)
commands.review_summary:
Refactors ClawSweeper PR review comments to use a compact `Merge readiness` section, move labels/evidence/workflow content into collapsibles, and update previous-review extraction plus renderer tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a PR changing review-comment rendering and extraction rather than a bug report. The relevant check is focused renderer/parser validation plus a real comment-sync proof path.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane action is appropriate because the remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer real behavior proof, not a narrow code defect.

target.title: fix: Refactor PR review comment layout
target.body:
## Summary
- Compress PR review freshness into the verdict line.
- Replace separate visible PR rating/proof blocks with a compact `Merge readiness` section.
- Move label churn, evidence, rank explanations, workflow notes, and PR surface stats into focused collapsibles.
- Keep proof-blocker guidance visible in `Merge readiness` when proof is missing, mock-only, or insufficient.
- Keep previous-review extraction compatible with both the old durable comment layout and the new compact layout.

## What stayed unchanged
- Proof, rating, label, finding, marker, and sync semantics are unchanged.
- Audit content such as `What I checked` is still rendered, now under `Evidence reviewed`.
- The existing `publicRealBehaviorProofLine` guidance is reused rather than changing proof policy.
- Old durable comments with `Latest ClawSweeper review`, `PR rating`, and `Real behavior proof` sections still parse.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: PR review comments are reorganized for faster maintainer scanning without changing ClawSweeper decision semantics, proof-blocked PRs still show actionable proof guidance in the visible readiness path, and compact durable comments still feed prior-review context into future reviews.
Real environment tested: Local ClawSweeper test/build environment in `/Users/takayukihoffman/github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper-pr-review-comment-ia`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.json`; `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts`; `node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts`; `/Users/takayukihoffman/github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives -D correctness`; `git diff --check`.
Evidence after fix: The focused test file passed with 281 tests and 0 failures, including coverage for compact freshness, `Merge readiness`, proof-blocked strong-patch output, visible proof guidance, compact previous-review extraction, label details, evidence details, PR surface placement, rank legend, and workflow details. The compact durable review parser regression proves that this shape is extracted correctly:

```md
Codex review: needs real behavior proof before merge. _Reviewed May 24, 2026, 8:34 AM ET / 12:34 UTC._

**Summary**
The PR changes review comment layout.

**Merge readiness**
Overall: 🧂 unranked krab
Proof: 🧂 unranked krab
Patch quality: 🦞 diamond lobster
Result: blocked until real behavior proof is added.

Proof guidance:
Needs real behavior proof before merge: The PR has no real ingestion-run proof yet. After adding proof, update the PR body; ClawSweeper should re-review automatically.
```

Observed result after fix: Generated PR review comments keep the top-level surface concise while preserving label explanations and evidence in collapsibles, proof-blocked comments retain visible contributor instructions, and future reviews can recover reviewed time, overall rating, proof guidance, next step, and findings from compact durable comments.
What was not tested: Full repository `pnpm run check` was not run locally because this clean worktree did not have local package-manager tooling installed; focused build, formatting, lint, and test coverage were run locally, and GitHub CI `pnpm check` passed on the pushed branch.

## Verification
- `node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.json`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts`
- `node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts`
- `/Users/takayukihoffman/github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives -D correctness`
- `git diff --check`
- GitHub CI `pnpm check`
target.author: takhoffman

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
